characters.name: 'Spinner (Earth-616)
characters.description:
'Spinner(ofEarth-616) is the Spider-Man of another planet in the Milky Way galaxy and a member of theGalactic Alliance of Spider-Men. 'Spinner was a member of the The Galactic Alliance of Spider-Men. The group was established to set policy for a hundred thousand worlds so that throughout the galaxy, great power would always come with great responsibility.
'Spinner expressed deep concern for his 320-year-old Aunt Rae-843, who had a heart attack just before he left for the meeting of the Galactic Alliance of Spider-Men. Apparently her heart was the only organic part left in her, which made him worry even more.

characters.name: Aaron Aikman (Earth-31411)
characters.description: Aaron Aikman was a scientist who specialized in insect and arachnid venoms. He secretly was splicing his DNA with that of a spider to give himself superhuman powers. He also created apower suitto supplement his powers with hi-tech sensor and weaponry. Calling himself Spider-Man, he fought a weather-controlling super-villain and an alien-possessed cyborg, only to die at the hands ofMorlun.

characters.name: Aaron Davis (Reality Zero)
characters.description: "Technologically enhanced world-class criminal and the most dangerous thief in America."— In-game description ProwlerRelease DateApril 19th, 2022Cost950 V-BucksSetProwlerUnlocked via:Chapter 3: Season 2Battle Pass(unavailable) Aaron Davis(of Reality Zero) is an alternate version of theMarvel ComicscharacterThe Prowlerthat appears in the video gameFortnite: Battle Royale.He was added to the game in theChapter 3: Season 2Battle Passas the quest skin of the Season, he was unlocked on April 19th, 2022. Due to Chapter 3: Season 2 ending, he is no longer available.

characters.name: Adrian Toomes (Earth-1048)
characters.description: Adrian Toomes(ofEarth-1048) also known asVultureis a minor antagonist and member of the Sinister Six inMarvel's Spider-Man. Adrian Toomes it was a electromagnetic engineer what created a special costume with wings and clawed boots. He soon saw that could practice robberies using the suit,  thus assuming the identity of Vulture and coming into conflict with Spider-Man. Recently being defeated and being stuck with other enemies of Spidey. Adrian Toomes i was in prison when he was released from Electro,Rhino,Scorpion and Mr. Negative. Spider-Man was trying to stop them and other prisioners while chasing Electro by the prison otside. And when he got it the Vulture appeared and took him to the skies, but was soon neutralized by a web warrior in the face. He reappears when the whole Sinister Six is together and invest, but he can get them for a certain period of time, until Scorpion hits him with his tool before Dr. Octopus throws it into the sea.

characters.name: Adrian Toomes (Earth-199999)
characters.description: Hey! Article is astub. This means that it is short and needs more information, or should be expanded with up to date information, if there is any new information.Youcan help theSpider-Man Wikibyexpanding it. Thanks!Remember users, remove this templateONLYif the article has been expanded enough.  "How do you think your buddy Stark paid for that tower? Or any of his little toys? Those people, Pete, those people up there- The rich and the powerful- they do whatever they want! Guys like us? Like you and me? They don't care about us. We build their roads and fight all their wars and everything, but they don't care about us. We have to pick up after 'em, we have to eat their table-scraps...that's how it is."— Adrian Toomes

characters.name: Adrian Toomes (Earth-26496)
characters.description: Adrian Toomes(ofEarth-26496), also known asVulture, is an alternate version of Adrian Toomes and enemy to Spider-Man. Adrian was an aerodynamics engineer  who developed a electromagnetic winged harness that allows the person who wears it to fly and presented it to Oscorp. Norman Osborn rejected Adrian's designs, crushing his dreams. Four months later, Norman announced that his Oscorp business was in the process of making "Flight Tech" a clear rip from Adrian's design. Adrian threatens to go public with the fact that he made "Flight Tech" but Norman not only refuses to apologize, but goes on to say that no one would believe him for making such an advanced system, considering how old he is.

characters.name: Adrian Toomes (Earth-26496)

characters.name: Adrian Toomes (Earth-616)
characters.description: "I fought Daredevil. I was in the Sinister Six. I'm faster, stronger, and smarter than a hundred men my age. No flunky with a pistol gets the drop onme."— Vulture

characters.name: Adrian Toomes (Earth-90214)
characters.description: Adrian Toomes(ofEarth-90214) is an alternate version ofThe Vulturethat originates from the Noir universe. Adrian Toomes was a former carnival freak whose performance consisted of biting the heads off live chickens. When not performing he was caged like an animal and treated worse then one. As a result he grew to despise both his captors and the people who paid their two cents to laugh at his misery, leading to a whole new appreciation for humans... according to him they taste better than chicken. Recruited intoNorman Osborn'scriminal empire he would go on to become his top hitman and boss under the name Vulture. Vulture's modus operandi is to jump down and surprise his victims then proceed to eat them alive. This method is precisely how he killedSpider-Man'sUncle Benright before the young boy's eyes leading to Spider-Man's never ending hatred of Goblin who ordered the hit... and the Monster that did the dirty work.
